name: reproai
description: Author-facing pre-diagnose for replication packages. The static skills (check, comply, fix) scan a working directory, apply an author rule set and a venue profile (AEA, ...), and advise how to reorganize the package so a downstream reproducibility check passes on the first try — without executing author code. The optional debug skill runs the package as a smoke test (does it run, did the injected table/figure outputs appear). reproai never compares coefficients and never issues a reproducibility verdict.
